name: CDW Corporation
analysis: CDW's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $133.3000, stop $121.8591, target $167.6227 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
